alpha_hypothesis: Day-2 follow-through add-ons should require a strong checkpoint close location so the system adds to confirmed winners, not intraday-faded failed-followthrough positions.

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but lags indexes
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

notes: Strict day-2 follow-through add-on is enabled by default after exp-20260427-013.
Add-on fills at next available ticker open after checkpoint using entry slippage.
Incremental shares are capped by original-share fraction, single-position cap, and portfolio heat cap.

production_impact.rollback_reason: Gate 4 failed; no add-on close-location policy retained in production/backtest code.

history_guardrails.why_not_simple_repeat: This tests checkpoint candle quality as a separate failed-followthrough discriminator, not more RS/unrealized tightening or another MFE/breakeven stop.

llm_metrics.why_not_llm_soft_ranking: LLM soft-ranking remains blocked by sparse production-aligned outcome joins; this uses replayable OHLCV lifecycle context.

gate4_basis: Promotion requires aggregate EV >10% or aggregate PnL >5%, EV improvement in at least 2/3 windows, and no EV-regressed window.
rejection_reason: No tested close-location threshold passed multi-window Gate 4; code changes were rolled back.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby close-location thresholds without forward evidence.
A valid retry needs event/news or a stronger failed-followthrough discriminator.
